calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR #7782.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Michael Shew, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Shannon Stott.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 20, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---The Coronado Lease Agreement dated 08/09/07------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice ot Pay Rent of Quit dated 03/10/08----------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff John Stewart Company, and against defendant SHANNON STOTT as follows:

Plaintiff John Stewart Company shall recover from defendant SHANNON STOTT Rent/Per Diem Damages in the sum of $1,144.80, and Costs in the amount of 345.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $1,489.80.

Plaintiff John Stewart Company is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 373 Ellis Street, #315, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
